sourceTitle: 250 Most Important Lies of the Past 250 Years
publicationRule: A source-list entry is not playable until the relevant spoken statement, speaker, source availability, exact timestamps, context window, and supporting evidence have been reviewed. A related documentary or commentary video alone is not sufficient.
editorialNote: Many ranked entries predate recorded video or describe institutional propaganda rather than a single attributable sentence. Those entries require an archival spokesperson clip or a clearly attributed direct mention before publication.
